entities.name: INTERNATIONAL CHICKPEA AND PIGEONPEA NEWSLETTER
entities.description: An annual publication by ICRISAT serving as a worldwide communication link for research and development of chickpea, pigeonpea, and their wild relatives.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The organization that publishes the International Chickpea and Pigeonpea Newsletter.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a crop focused on in the research and development reported in the ICPN.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., a crop focused on in the research and development reported in the ICPN.

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Wild relatives of chickpea and pigeonpea involved in research and development.

entities.name: PEER-REVIEW
entities.description: The process of evaluation used for contributions appearing in the ICPN.

entities.name: REFEREED JOURNALS
entities.description: Publications where work reported in the ICPN is expected to be formally published later.
